typography.instructions: Import fonts from Google Fonts: Manrope (400, 500, 600, 700), Inter (variable), JetBrains Mono (variable). Use Manrope for all Headings. Use JetBrains Mono for ALL numerical data (prices, stock, SKUs, IDs).

colors.theme_strategy: High Contrast Light Mode by default. Dark Mode available for 'Night Ops'. Avoid broad gradients. Use solid colors and 1px borders.

layout.spacing_system: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards. Gap-6 for grids.
layout.grid_strategy: Bento Grid (Mode B). Dense, functional, minimal gaps (gap-4).
layout.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar, width 64 (256px). Collapsible on mobile.

cards.style: Flat, 1px border (border-slate-200), no shadow by default. Hover: shadow-md transition-all duration-200.

inputs.style: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 rounded-sm font-medium

tables.style: Dense. Header: bg-slate-50 uppercase text-xs tracking-wider text-slate-500. Rows: hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors. Font-mono for numbers.

status_badges.style: Pill shape, px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px borders everywhere to define structure. Opacity 100% in light mode, 20% in dark mode.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise texture on sidebar background to reduce digital sterility.
visual_enhancers.empty_states: Use minimalist logistics imagery with grayscale filter.

icons.usage: Use icons to support labels, not replace them.

design_rules.contrast: Ensure WCAG AA compliance. Text on colored badges must be dark enough.
design_rules.interaction: All clickable elements must have a :hover and :active state. Buttons should scale down slightly (0.98) on click.
design_rules.data_density: High. Avoid wasted white space in tables. Use compact rows.
design_rules.language: UI Text MUST be in SPANISH (Español).

component_overrides.sonner: Use rich colors for toasts. Success = Emerald, Error = Rose.
component_overrides.shadcn_ui: Customize radius to 0.25rem (4px). Customize font-family to Manrope.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) only for sticky headers/modals.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Add transitions for specific properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Always use modern button styles (sharp/semi-rounded) with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖, 🧠, etc) for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (kebab-case).
